title: axonopus semialatus
intro: Axonopus semialatus, also known as the tropical bent grass, is a type of grass species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Axonopus semialatus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
